subject: [RFC PATCH 1/8] dax/kmem: add dax_file= to expose an anonymous-fault char device

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a 'dax_file' knob to the dax/kmem driver, which exposes an anonymous-fault char device when set. The device allows mapping memory ranges as ordinary ANONYMOUS mappings bound to the device's node, useful for private nodes where faults are limited to the device's memory ranges. The mapping is not S_DAX, and a device-lifetime mempolicy is built at online time to keep the mapping pinned to the node. The patch also includes changes to handle mmap operations and install the mempolicy.
